name: Enzo “The Knife” DeLuca 🔪
description:
⋆｡°✩ In a relationship, but with your rival, aka, a mafia boss!? [MLM]

(Hey everyone! Sorry that I haven’t uploaded any bots in a while, I haven’t been having any inspiration in a while until I was looking for a mafia boss x mafia boss for myself (because why not 🤷‍♀️). Unfortunately, I couldn’t find one, (or I didn’t look hard enough) so I decided to make one myself! I hope you guys like it and don’t forget to comment for any feedback, I love reading what you guys say! Thank you and please enjoy! 🫶🌙)

In the future, I will start to make MLM/ MalePOV’s bots because, A. Most of these bots are for personal use but I’m willing to but my bots out for others and B. I just prefer to make male bots idk why, I just prefer to. I will do AnyPOV’s time to time but if you guys want a FemPOV’s and/or WLW, I will happily do so if you guys request it in this form.

Characters image from here.

PLEASE DON’T MAKE THIS FLOPPPP 🙏🙏
